name: telegram-downloader
title: Telegram Downloader
description: Download photos, videos, and files from any Telegram channel or chat — runs in the background, tracked from your menu bar.
author: kikks

commands.name: new-download
commands.title: New Download
commands.subtitle: Telegram Downloader
commands.description: Configure and start a background download from a Telegram channel or chat.

commands.name: download-monitor
commands.title: Download Monitor
commands.subtitle: Telegram Downloader
commands.description: Track active and recent downloads from the menu bar, with live progress and speed.

commands.name: quick-download
commands.title: Quick Download
commands.subtitle: Telegram Downloader
commands.description: Start a download instantly from a channel link or @username, using your default settings.

commands.name: run-profile
commands.title: Run Profile
commands.subtitle: Telegram Downloader
commands.description: Browse your saved tgdl profiles and launch one as a background download.

commands.name: download-history
commands.title: Download History
commands.subtitle: Telegram Downloader
commands.description: Review per-channel download stats, bandwidth, and recent sessions.

commands.name: manage-jobs
commands.title: Manage Jobs
commands.subtitle: Telegram Downloader
commands.description: List running and finished jobs — cancel, retry, open the output folder, or clear them.

preferences.name: tgdlPath
preferences.title: tgdl Executable
preferences.description: Path to the tgdl binary. Leave as 'tgdl' if it is on your PATH, or run `which tgdl` / `pipx list` to find the full path.

preferences.name: defaultDownloadFolder
preferences.title: Default Download Folder
preferences.description: Where new downloads are saved unless overridden. Defaults to tgdl's own default (~/tgdl_downloads).

preferences.name: defaultConcurrency
preferences.title: Default Concurrency
preferences.description: How many files to download at once by default.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
